# tests/fixtures

`SPY_daily.csv` and `GLD_daily.csv` in this directory are **synthetic**
data (deterministic seeded random walk), generated by
`scripts/generate_synthetic_fixtures.py`, because network/yfinance
access was unavailable in the build environment.

To replace with real captured data once network access is available:

```bash
uv run python scripts/capture_fixtures.py SPY GLD
```

This overwrites the CSVs with real daily OHLCV bars via `YFinanceProvider`.
Tests do not depend on which source produced the fixtures -- only on the
schema (`date,open,high,low,close,volume`) and the invariants asserted in
`tests/test_datasource.py`.
